the 2nd house, (c) planet or planets posited in the
2nd house, (d) planets aspecting lord of the 2nd, (e) planet
or planets in association with lord of the 2nd, and (f) lord of
the 2nd from the Moon.
The factors mentioned above may influence the 2nd
house either as lords of main periods or as lords of sub-
periods. (1) The sub-periods of planets capable of
influencing the 2nd house in the major periods of those
who are also capable of influencing the 2nd house produce
results pertaining to the 2nd house par excellence. (2) The
sub-periods of planets associated with the 2nd house in the
major periods, whose lords are not associated with the 2nd

to a limited extent. Likewise, the sub-periods whose lords
